title: Cat Eyes
description: Toggle night vision instantly with a simple command! No OP permissions required – perfect for servers.
body:
Say goodbye to dark caves and the hassle of brewing potions! With Cat Eyes, every player on your server gets full control over their vision – no operator permissions required.
---
**Features:**

- On-Demand Night Vision: Players can toggle their vision whenever they need it.
- No Cheats Needed: Uses the /trigger system, so it works perfectly for non-OP players.
---
**How to use:**

It’s simple! Just type the following command into your chat:
- /trigger nightvision – Toggles Night Vision ON or OFF.
---
**Installation:**

1. Download the .zip file.
2. Place it into the datapacks folder of your world save.
3. Run /reload in-game or restart your server.
4. Done! Every player can use the command immediately.
